info.title: Tableau REST API
info.description: Tableau Server and Tableau Cloud REST API for managing workbooks, data sources, users, groups, permissions, and server administration.

server.description: Tableau Server or Tableau Cloud hostname

get.summary: Get default workbooks permissions for project

put.summary: Set default workbooks permissions for project

get.summary: Get default datasources permissions for project

put.summary: Set default datasources permissions for project

PageSize.name: pageSize
PageSize.description: Number of items to return per page

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: Sign in, sign out, token management
